_status: PROPOSED DRAFT - owner must review, edit, ratify (date + sign-off), then load; loads fail closed while status is not RATIFIED. Milestones and owner_agent assignments below are drawn directly from the already-ratified playbooks and the agents actually built - not invented independently.
_purpose: Listing lifecycle milestones and entry criteria

entries.entry_criteria: Content approved by 17 AND go-live pre-authorized in the signed onboarding package
Asset released to 12 AND CCP gate clear (MLS confirmed or documented exempt status)
Buyer agreement on file AND identity verified (per showing request)
Per P02 - market/showing feedback signals reviewed on the configured cadence
Offer accepted, timeline loaded with full deadline set (P09)
Financing contingency deadline tracked, not yet removed
All P09 milestones satisfied via verified artifact, closing block on calendar
transaction.closed issued, settlement statement on file
Closed - handoff to after-close relationship management (P10, P13)
Listing period lapsed without a closed transaction (P05)
